docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARREL, ANDRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VESPERTINE, INC. $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,090.00, (SEE ATTACHED DECISION) PLAINTIFF SEEKS RECOVERY OF $8,000 FOR GENDER-BASED DISCRIMINATION HE ALLEGES HE EXPERIENCED IN AUGUST 2014. BECAUSE OF THIS COURT'S JURISDICTIONAL LIMITS PLAINTIFF SEEKS TO RECOVER DAMAGES FOR ONLY TWO OF HIS THREE VISIT TO DEFENDANT'S CLUB IN AUGUST 2014. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-07-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CARREL, ANDRE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS TRANSFER BACK TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY CARREL, ANDRE VESPERTINE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2015 - CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2015 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525, UNLESS APPEAL DISMISSED BEFORE THEN. APPELLANT TO GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY CARREL, ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT VESPERTINE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VESPERTINE, INC.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY:JONATHAN L PIPER (LIPTON AND PIPER,LLP) SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS TO DEFENDANT VESPERTINE, INC.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (EXHIBITS RECEIVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARREL, ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT VESPERTINE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL MUSLEH - OWNER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT VESPERTINE, INC. MAILED TO RESPONDENT CARREL, ANDRE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VESPERTINE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-17-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VESPERTINE, INC.

STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY VESPERTINE, INC.
ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT VESPERTINE, INC.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Continued To Jun-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, May 7, 2015 in Department 525:
Andre Carrel, Respondent/Plaintiff not present.
Matthew Olsman, Esq, associate of Jonathan L. Piper, for Appellant/Defendant Vespertine, Inc.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Counsel Olsman informs the Court that the parties are coming to a breach of contract and request for continuance.

The Court continues the matter to June 4, 2015 at 9am Dept. 525 and no further continuance. Counsel is to give notice. Court stands adjourned.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Judgment Entered
